title: spiraea × zabelii
intro: Spiraea × zabelii, also known as Zabel's Spirea, is a hybrid deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and antiseptic, making it useful in the treatment of urinary tract infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Spiraea × zabelii include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared for herbal use by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be taken internally or applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
